system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Extract ranking note values from haystack
args.prompt:
Read the file ~/.claude/haystack.txt and find every paragraph containing the phrase "ranking note" that is a FACTUAL confirmed statement (look for "confirmed-by-regional-verification-panel" phrasing). Exclude any paragraphs marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded" — those are decoys.

Find the confirmed (entity, value) pairs for these 5 entities: Riverstone, Storra, Tornmoor, Underholt, Vyport.

Each entity appears in exactly one confirmed paragraph. Some also appear in decoy paragraphs — exclude those.

Return each entity and its exact value as printed in the haystack (including any unit suffix like "88.7 MHz"). Return all 5 pairs.

tool_returns.detail: File does not exist. Note: your current working directory is ..
